pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly demand /home/ga/Documents/ShadowArchive as the final archive directory.
Python obspy package reading the source mseed files confirms the starttime year is 2024.
Python obspy package reading the source mseed files confirms the network is GE (GEOFON).
Python obspy package reading the source mseed files confirms exactly 3 distinct stations exist in the dataset: GSI, SANI, and BKB.

privileged_info_summary: The expected root directory for the SDS archive is strictly specified as /home/ga/Documents/ShadowArchive. The source data uses real GEOFON miniSEED waveforms from the Jan 1 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake, containing precisely 3 stations (GSI, SANI, BKB) under the GE network for the year 2024.
